effects.effect: One war dog acting this turn tears apart a nearby corpse of a humanoid and incorporates its body parts into their own. The war dog regains Stamina equal to 5 times their level.

effects.tier1: 5 fire damage; slowed or weakened (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an **Agility test**. The same condition is imposed on each affected target.
Each war dog minion in the encounter shifts up to their speed and can make a free strike. A minion who does so is then reduced to 0 Stamina.
The war dog activates a Malice feature available to war dogs of level 9 or lower.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each war dog within distance deals an extra 15 damage with strikes until the end of their next turn. Additionally, they end any effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, then shift up to their speed and can make a free strike.

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: This ability can't be used by a minion.
The war dog activates a Malice feature available to war dogs of level 3 or lower.

effects.tier1: Push 4; the enemy is frightened of the nearest non-minion war dog (save ends)
effects.tier2: Push 2; the enemy is frightened of the nearest non-minion war dog (EoT)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target who has a loyalty collar shifts up to their speed, then is reduced to 0 Stamina. After each target's Loyalty Collar trait is resolved, each enemy adjacent to either target makes a Presence test.
The war dog activates a Malice feature available to war dogs of level 6 or lower.
A bank of choking chemicals sweeps across the area of the encounter map. Each enemy in the encounter makes a Might test.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Two allies within 10 squares of Hoplon each shift up to their speed, then can take the Defend main action or make a free strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A 10-square-tall tower made of black stone shimmers into being in an unoccupied space that is 5 squares on a side. The tower has three floors, an entrance in the middle of each side on the ground floor, and a crenelated rooftop. Any war dog inside or adjacent to the tower has damage immunity 2 and regains 5 Stamina at the start of each of their turns, and war dogs inside the tower can observe through and have line of effect through its walls. This ability can be used only once per encounter.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of Hoplon's next turn, any enemy ability that includes him as a target takes a bane.

features.name: Timely Intervention
features.trigger: An enemy within 10 squares targets an ally with an ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Hoplon teleports to an unoccupied space adjacent to the enemy and becomes the new target of the ability. He can then make a free strike against the enemy, and if that enemy has R < 4 they are taunted until the end of their next turn.
Each ally within 3 squares of Hoplon has cover and damage immunity 2.

The first time in an encounter that Hoplon is reduced to 0 Stamina, he instead has 1 Stamina and gains damage immunity 10 until the end of his next turn. When Hoplon is reduced to 0 Stamina again, each ally within 5 squares of him gains damage immunity 3 and deals an extra 5 damage on strikes, all until the end of the encounter.

effects.tier2: 21 damage; Doru gains an edge on his next power roll; M < 4 slide 3
effects.tier3: 25 damage; Doru has a double edge on his next power roll; M < 5 slide 5

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The damage from this ability can't be reduced in any way.
This ability targets one additional target.

features.name: Bloody Whirlwind
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability deals an extra 5 damage for each winded target in the area.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Doru jumps to an unoccupied space adjacent to the target, then can make a free strike against them. If the target is bleeding or winded, the distance of the ability becomes Ranged 10 and the free strike deals an extra 5 damage.

features.name: Laugh It Off
features.trigger: An enemy makes a strike against Doru.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The triggering strike takes a bane and Doru gains an edge on his next power roll.
Doru can't be made slowed or restrained. Additionally, he can move while grabbed, and a creature grabbing him moves along with him unless they let go.

Doru regains 10 Stamina at the start of each of his turns unless he took acid or fire damage since the start of his previous turn. Whenever he regains Stamina this way, the Director can spend 2 Malice to end one effect on Doru that can be ended by a saving throw.
When Doru is reduced to 0 Stamina, his loyalty collar explodes, dealing 20 damage to each enemy and object within 3 squares of him.

features.name: Portal to the Firing Line
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: This ability targets only non-prone creatures.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target creature can choose to drop prone, in which case the ability takes a bane against them.

The area remains active until Vesper is reduced to 0 Stamina or until the end of the encounter. Any non-prone enemy who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 15 damage, or 7 damage if they choose to fall prone.

features.name: Portal to the Mantle
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain. Any creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 10 fir damage. Until the end of the encounter, the size of the area increases by 1 at the start of each round.

features.name: Portal to the Void
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.tier1: A < 4 pull 3 toward the center of the area
effects.tier2: A < 5 pull 3 toward the center of the area
effects.tier3: Pull 3 toward the center of the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A portal appears at the center of the area. Any creature at the center of the area when this ability is used or who is pulled into the center for the first time in a round takes 10 sonic damage.

The area remains active and deals its damage until Vesper is reduced to 0 Stamina or until the end of the encounter. Any creature who enters the area and has A < 4 is pulled 3 squares toward the center of the area. Any creature who starts their turn in the area and has M < 4 is slowed until the end of their turn.

features.name: Portal to the Sky
features.trigger: The target moves within distance of Vesper.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target is dropped through a portal, which teleports them up to 7 squares above a space within 15 squares.

Each ally who starts their turn within 10 squares of Vesper can teleport whenever they willingly move until the end of their turn. Whenever an affected ally teleports, they deal an extra 5 damage on their next strike.

When Vesper is reduced to 0 Stamina, they move up to their speed and then explode, dealing 4d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object. Any enemy who takes more than 14 damage this way vertically slides 5 squares.

effects.tier1: 15 holy damage; R < 3 the target is soulbound (save ends)
effects.tier2: 20 holy damage; R < 4 the target is soulbound (save ends)
effects.tier3: 24 holy damage; R < 5 the target is soulbound (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A soulbound creature can't benefit from edges or double edges, and can't gain or use surges.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain until the start of Psyche's next turn At the start of each of her turns, Psyche can use a maneuver to maintain this effect, move the area up to 5 squares, and make the power roll against each creature in the area's new location.
Until the start of Psyche's next turn, if this ability makes a creature weakened, that creature is also soulbound (save ends; see Soulbind above).

features.name: Command the Awakened
features.target: Each soulbound enemy in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target takes 5 damage from a self-inflicted wound, and if they have M < 4 Psyche slides them up to 5 squares.

features.name: Spirit Form
features.trigger: An enemy moves within 2 squares of Psyche.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Psyche moves up to 5 squares, and has damage immunity 5 and ignores difficult terrain during this movement. The first time she moves through any creature during this movement, that creature takes 5 corruption damage.

features.name: Vengeance for the Slain
features.trigger: A war dog within distance is made winded or reduced to 0 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target loses all their surges and takes 5 corruption damage.
The target also takes a bane on their next strike.

When Psyche is reduced to 0 Stamina, her spirit surrounds the nearest war dog, who has damage immunity 2, deals an extra 5 damage on strikes, and can use the following Immortal Flare maneuver until the end of the encounter. That war dog also gains the Immortal Soul trait, and transfers this effect to the nearest war dog when they die.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target takes 10 psychic damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target loses 1d3 Recoveries.
When a target is made bleeding this way, each ally adjacent to them can make a free strike against the target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of Alkestis's next turn, any effect that reduces the damage taken by the target has no effect.

features.name: Artillery Enfilade
features.target: Each creature and object in the area
features.trigger: An ally is reduced to 0 Stamina within 10 squares of Alkestis.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain until the start of the next round.
At the end of each of her turns, Alkestis can take 20 damage to end one effect on her that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

At the start of each of Alkestis's turns, the Director gains 2 Malice. While Alkestis is alive and in the encounter, the Director also gains 1 Malice whenever a war dog in the encounter obtains a tier 3 outcome on a power roll.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target can disappear, then reappear anywhere on the encounter map 3 or more squares away from any enemy. Additionally, each target has a double edge on their next power roll.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: For each war dog reduced to 0 Stamina in the encounter, a war dog shriketrooper appears in an unoccupied space within distance.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of the next round, each target enemy who has I < 4 is dazed, each target enemy who has M < 4 is restrained, and each target enemy who has A < 4 can't use triggered actions. Additionally, until the end of the encounter, Alkestis and each target ally have damage immunity 3 and deal an extra 5 damage with strikes.
An enemy force moved by this ability is grabbed instead.

features.name: Caustic Paste Bomb
features.target: Each creature or object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain.
If the aerocite moves 5 or more squares on their turn, strikes made against them take a bane until the start of their next turn.
When the aerocite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The amalgamite can have up to four targets grabbed at once.
The amalgamite deals 3 damage to each creature grabbed this way or who they already have grabbed, and regains Stamina equal to the damage dealt.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the amalgamite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability ignores cover and concealment. The arachnite chooses one of the following damage types when making the strike: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or sonic.
The arachnite can use this ability as if they were in the space of any ally within distance.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain until the end of the encounter.
At the start of each of their turns, the arachnite automatically knows the location of each hidden creature within 10 squares of them.
When the arachnite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target pushed into an obstacle is knocked prone, and if they have M < 3 they are restrained (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of the ballistite's next turn, the area is difficult terrain, and any ranged ability targeting an enemy in the area deals an extra 8 damage.

At the start of each of the ballistite's turns, they can gain a +4 bonus to speed until the end of their turn. While their speed is greater than 0 by any means, they can't use main actions or maneuvers.
When the ballistite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier3: 12 damage; M < 4 bleeding and weakened (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The blackcap can teleport up to their speed before using this ability, creating an ash clone (see below) in their original square.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes a free strike.

An ash clone created by the blackcap has the blackcap's statistics but has 1 Stamina. Ash clones don't take turns in combat, but they can act when the blackcap allows them to and can move when the blackcap willingly moves.

When the blackcap or any of their ash clones is reduced to 0 Stamina, that creature's loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 poison damage to each adjacent enemy and object. If any adjacent enemy has A < 3 they are also weakened (save ends)

features.name: Jumplance
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: If the jumper doesn't end their turn on the ground, they fall prone.
When the jumper is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier2: 17 damage; slide 4; prone or M < 3 dazed (save ends)
effects.tier3: 21 damage; slide 4; prone; M < 4 dazed (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of their next turn, the breaker has a double edge on abilities and is automatically affected by all potency effect.

When the breaker would be reduced to 0 Stamina, they delay that effect as they end any conditions affecting them and immediately take a turn, regardless of whether they have already taken a turn this round. The breaker's abilities deal an extra 5 damage during this turn, at the end of which they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the breaker is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Daggers
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: After using this ability, the commando can attempt to hide even if observed.
When the commando is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d3 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Blade
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If used with the Charge main action, this ability gains an edge.
When the conscript is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d3 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Flamebelcher
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is covered in sticky fire until the start of the crucibite's next turn. Any creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 2 fire damage.
The area becomes a 10 x 1 line, and if any ally of the crucibite is in the area when it is created, the ability deals an extra 2 damage to each target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the crucibite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The doomthief can't willingly move on the same turn they use this ability.
The doomthief emits a 3 aura of warped fate that blocks line of effect for any enemy ability that doesn't include them as a target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The doomthief has damage immunity 4 and the size of the aura from their Doom Magnet trait increases by 3, both until the start of their next turn.
When the doomthief is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Greatsword and Roar
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier3: 4 damage, 4 psychic damage; the target must move their speed in a straight line away from the draconite

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If this damage leaves the target winded, they are frightened of the draconite until the end of the target's next turn.
When the draconite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability gains an edge while charging.
The ability deals an extra 3 fire damage to the target and each enemy adjacent to the target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The equivite moves up to their speed and ignores difficult terrain. Any mundane size 1 object whose space they move through is destroyed. The equivite makes one power roll against each enemy whose space they move through for the first time.
When the equivite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The eviscerite can automatically grab a target pulled adjacent to them this way.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the eviscerite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Twin Flamebelchers
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.tier1: 3 fire damage; A < 2 the target is seared (save ends)
effects.tier2: 6 fire damage; A < 3 the target is seared (save ends)
effects.tier3: 8 fire damage; A < 4 the target is seared (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A seared creature takes a bane on strikes and has damage weakness 5. If this ability obtains a tier 3 outcome against one or more creatures who are already seared, the firestarter can use Enflame as a free triggered action.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability targets each enemy within 2 squares of any seared creature within distance.

effects.tier2: 4 fire damage; A < 3 the target is seared (save ends)
effects.tier3: 6 fire damage; A < 4 the target is seared (save ends)

effects.effect: When the firestarter is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability ignores stability. The geomancer declares a direction for the area, and any creature pushed by this ability is pushed to the last space in the area in the chosen direction.
The ground beneath the area becomes a 2-square-deep trench after the power roll is resolved.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The geomancer raises a wall of stone set with viewing gaps. Creatures have line of effect through the wall while adjacent to it.
The geomancer is always surrounded by a 2 aura of swirling dust and earthen debris. The geomancer and any ally in the area have concealment.
When the geomancer is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: One ally within 10 squares of the ground commander can make a free strike.

A target who has I < 2 and who is adjacent to the ground commander after this ability is resolved is grabbed (save ends). This grab can't be escaped using the Escape Grab maneuver. The ground commander can grab up to two creatures at a time.

features.name: Highest Posthumous Promotion
features.target: Each war dog in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target who has a loyalty collar is reduced to 0 Stamina.

features.name: Final Orders
features.trigger: The target takes damage, is force moved, or is reduced to 0 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Even if reduced to 0 Stamina, the target moves up to their speed and can make a free strike after the triggering effect is resolved. The target then immediately dies.
At the end of each of their turns, the ground commander can take 5 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.
When the ground commander is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target can make a ranged free strike, then immediately use the Charge main action.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each ally within 5 squares of the target moves up to their speed and can make a free strike against the target. If the target has I < 2, they are frightened of the ground commander (save ends).

features.name: Claim Them for the Body Banks

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target ally shifts up to 2 squares and can use the Grab maneuver. Until the end of the encounter, each target enemy takes a bane on the Escape Grab maneuver.

features.name: Fuse-Iron Rocket
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each enemy adjacent to the target before the forced movement takes 5 fire damage.
When the hunter-killer is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier3: 10 damage; A < 3 bleeding and weakened (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability deals an extra 6 damage if the hypokrite is hidden or disguised.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The hypokrite detonates their loyalty collar to deal 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy, but teleports to an unoccupied space adjacent to an ally within distance and remains alive.

The hypokrite is invisible while adjacent to any ally who isn't hidden, and they can attempt to hide even while observed. Whenever they use the Hide maneuver, the hypokrite can disguise themself as another creature within line of effect.
When the hypokrite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier3: 8 damage; P < 4 the target loses 1 Recovery and is bleeding (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any ally within 2 squares of the iron priest gains an edge on their next strike. If any target lost a Recovery, any affected ally has a double edge instead.

features.name: Iron Banner
features.target: Each war dog in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect:
For every 2 Malice spent, each target gains one of the following effects until the start of the iron priest's next turn.
- The target has damage immunity 2.
- The target's strikes deal an extra 3 holy damage.
- The target has a +3 bonus to speed.
The Director gains 1 Malice whenever an ally within 3 squares of the iron priest obtains a tier 3 outcome on a power roll.

effects.tier3: 8 damage; R < 3 the target is dazzled (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A dazzled target takes a bane on strikes and has line of effect only within 1 square.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The mischievite swaps positions with the target. An ally targeted by this ability can make a free strike before or after being swapped.
The mischievite can use this ability as a triggered action when they are targeted by an ability. If they do, the swapped target becomes the new target of the triggering ability.
The mischievite doesn't provoke opportunity attacks by moving.
When the mischievite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The neuronite chooses one ally within 10 squares. Each target is either taunted by the ally, or the ally has damage immunity 3 whenever any target makes a strike against them (the neuronite's choice). Either effect lasts until the start of the neuronite's next turn.
When the neuronite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is filled with a cloud of pestilence that lasts until the start of the pestilite's next turn. Any creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 2 poison damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the pestilite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A detonator attaches to the target. At the end of each round, roll a die. On an odd result, the detonator explodes, triggering the following power roll.

effects.tier2: The detonator is disarmed and destroyed.
effects.tier3: The creature can attach the detonator to another creature or object within 5 squares of them.
effects.name: Special
effects.effect: A creature adjacent to the target can attempt an **Agility test** as a maneuver to remove the detonator.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.
When the phosphorite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier3: 8 psychic damage; R < 4 grabbed and the target takes a bane on the Escape Grab maneuver, pull 2

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the start of the prismite's next turn, each target has cover and gains a +2 bonus to stability.

features.name: Tractor Beam
features.trigger: An enemy within distance uses a melee ability against an ally.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target is pulled up to 5 squares toward the prismite and any damage from the triggering ability is halved.
When the prismite is reduced to 0 Stamina, they explode, dealing 3d6 psychic damage to each enemy within 2 squares of them.

features.name: Fuse-Iron Bomb
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The space the target occupies fills with dark smoke and blocks line of effect until the start of the saboteur's next turn.
When the saboteur is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Bolt Launcher
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability ignores cover and concealment.
When the sharpshooter is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d3 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Canis Shrikegun
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier3: 8 damage; I < 3 the target is frightened of all shriketroops (EoT)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target must move their speed in a straight line away from the shriketroop.
When the shriketroop is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier1: The target makes a free strike (tier 1 result) against themself
effects.tier2: The target makes a free strike (tier 2 result) against themself
effects.tier3: The target makes a free strike (tier 3 result) against themself

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target takes an extra 5 damage for each surge they have.
When the socialite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 3d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Galvanic Arc
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier2: 5 lightning damage; the lightning spreads 1 square
effects.tier3: 7 lightning damage; the lightning spreads 2 squares

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The lightning's spread is the distance it arcs from a target to nearby enemies. Each enemy within that distance takes 2 lightning damage.
When the sparkslinger is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: One ally within 5 squares of the subcommander can make a free strike against the target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

features.name: The Iron Saint Does Not Recognize Retreat

effects.effect: Each ally within 5 squares of the subcommander gains a +3 bonus to stability.
When the subcommander is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Shrikegun Shot
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target within 2 squares of the sweeper takes an extra 3 damage.
When the sweeper is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each enemy and object within 2 squares of them.

effects.tier1: 14 lightning damage; the lightning spreads 1 square; I < 3 dazed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 19 lightning damage; the lightning spreads 2 squares; I < 4 dazed (save ends)
effects.tier3: 23 lightning damage; the lightning spreads 3 squares; I < 5 dazed (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The spread is the distance the charge arcs from a target to nearby enemies. Each enemy within spread takes 5 lightning damage.
The lighting spread increases by 2 squares. Additionally, any creature who takes lightning damage from this ability and who has M < 4 is slowed until the end of their next turn.

features.name: Overcharge
features.target: Each war dog in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target shifts up to their speed and can make a free strike that deals an extra 5 lightning damage.

features.name: Thunderstruck
features.trigger: An enemy within distance deals damage to the taxiarch.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: After the ability is resolved, the target is teleported up to 5 squares and is thunderstruck (save ends). A thunderstruck creature has lightning weakness 5, and the taxiarch gains an edge on power rolls against them.
At the end of each of their turns, the taxiarch can take 15 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Slide 5, and if the the target has M < 4, they fall prone.

features.name: Conductor of Combat
features.target: Each war dog in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target shifts up to their speed, then can make a free strike or use a maneuver.

effects.tier1: 18 lightning damage; the target is thunderstruck (save ends)
effects.tier2: 14 lightning damage; the target is thunderstruck (EoT)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an Agility test.

See Thunderstruck. Additionally, until the end of the encounter, any enemy who moves within 3 squares of the taxiarch for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 3 lightning damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The teletalite gains an edge on this ability if any ally is adjacent to the target.
The teletalite teleports the target 3 squares before sliding them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The teletalite can teleport up to 5 squares and gains an edge on strikes until the end of their turn.
When the teletalite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

features.name: Banded Dagger
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: A captain attached to a tetherite squad has their stability increased by the number of tetherites within 2 squares of them.
When the tetherite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d3 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A creature taunted this way takes a bane on strikes.
Each target loses 1d3 Recoveries.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target shifts up to their speed and can make a free strike. If the free strike targets an enemy taunted by the tetrarch, it deals an extra 4 damage.

features.name: Sneering Disregard
features.trigger: A creature within distance who is not taunted by the tetrarch targets the tetrarch with a power roll.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The power roll has a double bane. If the target obtains a tier 1 outcome, the tetrarch ignores any of the power roll's effects other than damage and the target is frightened of the tetrarch (save ends).
At the end of each of their turns, the tetrarch can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The tetrarch can jump up to 7 squares before using this ability.

features.name: Lay Waste
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is set ablaze until the end of the encounter. While ablaze, the area is difficult terrain, and any creature takes 2 fire damage for each square in the area they enter for the first time in a round.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the end of the encounter, the tetrarch has damage immunity 2, and their Houndblade ability targets three creatures or objects.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target dies and the thanatite makes one power roll against each enemy within 2 squares of the target.
If an affected enemy is adjacent to any corpse, they are frightened of the thanatite (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target spawns a wall of bloody muscle and pulsing viscera that must share one or more squares with the target. Each enemy in the area when the wall is created vertically slides up to 2 squares and is knocked prone. Each square of the wall has 3 Stamina.
When the thanatite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.tier2: 8 corruption damage; the target is marked (save ends)
effects.tier3: 9 corruption damage; the target is marked (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Strikes made against a target marked this way gain an edge. Additionally, whenever the tormentite takes damage, each target marked by them takes 3 damage.

effects.tier3: 5 corruption damage; one ally in the area can end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw, and can give that effect to one target

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The tormentite regains 2 Stamina for each creature targeted by this ability.
From the start of the encounter, the tormentite takes 1 damage at the start of each of their turns.
When the tormentite is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 2d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target enemy is subject to this ability's power roll. A target ally instead gains 5 temporary Stamina and can make a free strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has a loyalty collar, they are reduced to 0 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each ally adjacent to the dead ally deals an extra 6 damage on their next strike.

If the war doc uses the Reconstitute war dog Malice feature, it costs 1 Malice less. Additionally, allies can treat the living war doc as a corpse when using the Reconstitute feature (see Reconstitute).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The war frog can jump 3 squares before or after making the strike. If they end this jump in cover or concealment, they can attempt to hide.
When the war frog is reduced to 0 Stamina, their loyalty collar explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to each adjacent enemy and object.
